# terrible_community_general_keycloak_realm_key (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the realm key to create.
- `parent_id` (String) The parent_id of the realm key. In practice the name of the realm.

### Optional

- `config` (String) Dict specifying the key and its properties.
- `force` (Boolean) Enforce the state of the private key and certificate. This is not automatically the case as this module is unable to determine the current state of the private key and thus cannot trigger an update based on an actual divergence. That said, a private key update may happen even if force is false as a side-effect of other changes.
- `provider_id` (String) The name of the "provider ID" for the key. The value `rsa-enc` has been added in community.general 8.2.0.
- `state` (String) State of the keycloak realm key. On `present`, the realm key is created (or updated if it exists already). On `absent`, the realm key is removed if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of the keycloak_realm_key after module execution.
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
